index.head.description: All about Team Minus, the aetherian Minecraft modding team.
index.head.og:title: Team Minus - Minecraft modding team
index.head.og:description: Discover Team Minus, the aetherian Minecraft modding team.
index.description: The Team Minus is an international group of people giving their free time to create the greatest Minecraft X Diary of an 8-Bit Warrior experience. We aim to replicate the books experience in game as close as possible.
